base_rows.story:
He live in a small house with a red door.  
One morning, he wake up and see his key is not in the box.  
He look in all the room, but no key.  
He go to the garden and see a blue bird.  
The bird fly to the tree and sit on a chair.  
He ask the bird: "Do you know where my key is?"  
The bird say: "I see it in the wall."  
He run to the wall and find a small hole.  
He put his hand in and feel a cold thing.  
He pull it out and see a new key.  
He laugh and say: "This is not my key!"  
He go to the park and meet his friend.  
His friend say: "I found your key yesterday."  
He feel happy and go home.  
He know now that the key was in the box all the time.

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
He saw a mouse running in the garden.  
He wanted to catch the mouse, but the mouse was fast.  
The mouse ran into the house and hid under the table.  
The cat jumped and looked under the table.  
He found a red box with a key inside.  
He opened the box and saw a small blue book.  
The book had a word: "journey".  
He read it and felt happy.  
He knew the mouse had a journey to the castle.  
The castle was far, on a hill with a red roof.  
He asked the dog if he knew the way.  
The dog said, "No, but I saw a bird go to the castle."  
The cat said, "Then I will go on a journey to the castle."  
He walked with a small hat and a book.  
He went to the castle and found the mouse.  
They were friends and played together.  
The cat smiled and said, "We have a new story."

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
It was a cold morning and the sky was blue.  
A small dog ran into the garden and barked.  
He saw a red ball under the tree.  
He wanted to play with it.  
He jumped and caught the ball.  
He smiled and said, "Good day!"  
Then he saw a mouse with a long **whisker**.  
The mouse looked at him and said, "Hello!"  
He gave the mouse a piece of cheese.  
The mouse **whisked** his nose and ran away.  
He felt happy and went to the park.  
He saw a man with a big **umbrella**.  
The man said, "I need help!"  
He gave him a book and a piece of bread.  
They sat together and told a story.  
The sun came out and the day was warm.

The dog in the garden was very funny.  
He jump into the box and sit on top.  
He look at the cat and say, "I have a new name!"  
The cat say, "You are not brave!"  
But the dog stand up and run to the door.  
He find a red ball and start to play.  
He discover a small hole under the wall.  
He go in and see a mouse.  
He laugh and run out again.  
He want to play with the ball again.  
He go to the park and meet a friend.  
They play and eat cheese.  
The dog feel happy and warm.  
He know he is brave now.

The garden is quiet in the morning.  
A small red bird sits on a branch.  
She sees a mouse running near the wall.  
The mouse hides under a big stone.  
He looks at the stone and sees a small hole.  
A cat walks slowly and stops.  
She looks at the hole and sees a red ball.  
She thinks: "This is a mystery!"  
She asks the cat: "Do you know what it is?"  
The cat says: "I don’t know, but I feel it."  
They go to the garden door and open it.  
They find a box with a blue hat inside.  
The cat says: "This is not a mystery!"  
They laugh and sit on the chair.  
The sun comes out and the garden feels warm.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small red bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then the wind came and the box closed.  
I asked the cat: “Do you know what that was?”  
She said: “It was a new kind of adventure.”  
We all stood up and ran to the garden.  
We found a key under the table.  
We opened the door and saw a blue box.  
Inside, there was a book with a red hat.  
We read the story and felt happy.  
The night ended with a warm smile.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then, a red hat appeared on the floor.  
We did not know who put it there.  
A wizard stood in the hall with a big book.  
He said, “I found a magic key in the wall.”  
We all ran to the door and looked inside.  
The key opened a secret room behind the wall.  
In the room, there was a blue fish and a red chair.  
We sat down and told a story about the bird.  
The wizard smiled and said, “That was a good story.”  
We all felt happy and warm.  
The night ended with a quiet smile.

I live in a small house with a garden.  
Every morning, I go to the garden and see a red bird.  
The bird sits on a tree and sings a happy song.  
I ask the bird, "What is your name?"  
He says, "I am Tom."  
Tom is a funny bird with a blue hat.  
We play together in the garden.  
We jump, run, and hide behind the wall.  
One day, Tom says, "Let’s go on an adventure!"  
I say, "An adventure?" I don’t know what that means.  
Tom shows me a box with a key inside.  
He says, "This key opens a secret door."  
We go into the door and find a small room.  
In the room, we see a red chair and a book.  
We sit and read the book.  
We laugh and feel happy.  
Tom says, "We will go on many adventures again."

The boy found a key in the garden.  
He looked in the basket and saw a red ball.  
He went to the house and asked the cat.  
The cat said, "That key is for the castle."  
He ran to the castle and saw a big door.  
The door was closed and locked.  
He tried to open it with the key.  
But the key did not fit.  
He sat on the floor and felt sad.  
Then he saw a small bird in the tree.  
The bird said, "Look! The key is in your hand!"  
He looked again and saw the key in his basket.  
He smiled and went home.  
He told his friend about the castle and the key.  
They played in the garden and found more keys.

A small cat named Miso lived in a quiet house.  
He liked to sit by the window and watch birds.  
One morning, he saw a red ball in the garden.  
He asked the dog, "Do you know who dropped it?"  
The dog said, "I don’t know, but it looks like a creature."  
Miso felt surprised. He had never heard that word before.  
He looked around and saw a small hole in the wall.  
He thought, "Maybe a creature hid there."  
He went to the garden and found a tiny mouse.  
The mouse looked sad and had a blue hat.  
Miso said, "You are not a creature. You are a friend."  
The mouse smiled and said, "I lost my food."  
Miso gave him a piece of cheese.  
They sat together and told a story about the red ball.  
Miso felt happy and knew he had a new friend.

A blue bird lived in a big tree.  
He liked to sit on a branch and watch the garden.  
One morning, he saw a small mouse hiding under the floor.  
He wanted to help, so he whispered, "Don’t be afraid!"  
The mouse jumped up and ran away.  
The bird felt sad because he had not seen the mouse again.  
He asked the wind, "Do you know where the mouse went?"  
The wind said, "I heard a secret in the garden."  
He looked around and saw a red box with a key.  
He thought, "Maybe the mouse hid inside."  
He went to the box and opened it.  
Inside, he found a book with a secret word.  
He read it and smiled.  
He knew the mouse was safe.  
Now, every day, he whispers to the tree, "I love you."

It was a rainy day. The rain fell loud and cold. I sat on the chair and read a book. The window was wet and blue. A cat jumped on the table. She looked at me and smiled. I asked her, "Do you like rain?" She said, "Yes, it is quiet." I felt happy. I put a basket on the floor. The basket was full of food. I saw a small bird in the tree. It looked sad. I gave it a piece of cheese. The bird jumped and flew away. I felt warm and happy. The rain stopped and the sun came out. We all went to the garden. We played with a red ball. The day was not bad at all.

tuned_rows.story: You need a key to open the door, but the key is not here. You feel sad and start a journey to find it. A journey is when you walk or run from one place to another. You look in the room, on the table, and on the floor, but the key is not there. You ask your friend, and she tell you a story. She say the cat hide the key in the old box. You and the dog make a journey into the garden. You see the cat sit on a chair and read a book. You ask the cat, and he smile. He give you the key with a funny look. The key is blue and small, and it is cold. You open the door, and the sun come in. You and the dog run to the park, and the dog catch a bird. The cat and the dog then play in the green garden. You feel happy, and you think: a lost key is not so bad when a good friend help you find it.

Cat Detective Blue has a big house and a small hat. One day, a friend come to his door and say, "Blue, I need help! My key not here, and I need it to open my box of food!"

Blue look at her and think. He do not have a car or a bike, so he start a journey. He walk slow and quiet into the morning sun. He go out of his garden, into the park, and then more. A long journey for one small cat!

On his journey, he see a old castle in the green, cold night. The castle have a big red door and two big windows. Blue stop and look up at the castle with one eye. He ask a dog at the park, "Do you know a castle like this one?"

The dog say, "Yes, I know that castle. A mouse live in there, and he hide some old keys in the room close to the wall." Blue smile, and he run quick to the castle. He jump up and open the box, and there is the key! He give the key to his friend, and they all laugh and eat some good food. Blue sit on his chair, happy and hungry for more cheese.

I see a new dog at the door of the house.

He is small and funny, and I want to play with him.

I have a red umbrella in the room, and the dog has two big whiskers. They go from his eye to his nose, quick and small.

The dog looks at me with his big green eyes, and I smile.

I call him "Small Whisker" because his whiskers are so funny and quick.

He runs to the chair and then stops. He is hungry.

I open the box of food, and he is very happy.

We sit close and I tell him a story, and he listens all morning.

When it is cold and the rain come down, we go out to the garden.

I open my umbrella, and Small Whisker runs to the wall to hide.

He is not sad. He is happy to find water there.

I think a new friend like this one is very good.

We go to the park again, and the bird in the tree is loud.

Small Whisker and I laugh, and I feel warm and kind and happy here.

Bingo is a funny dog. He live in a small house with a green garden. One day, Bingo start to discover a new room. He walk into a room he do not know. He find a big chair and a old table there. He like to discover new rooms, so he go to find more. In one room, he see a blue box and a red hat on the floor. Bingo is brave when he hear a loud bird at the window. He do not hide, he stand up and look out. The bird is not bad, it is just funny, and Bingo smile. He ask his friend, a cat, to come and see the bird too. The cat is not so brave, so she sit down and feel sad. But Bingo is brave again, and he run to the door to call for help. They open the window, and the bird fly out into the garden. Now all of them laugh. Bingo and the cat eat some food and drink warm water. They read a good story and sleep. The next morning, Bingo discover a small key on the table. He jump up quick and happy, and he run to get it. He love to discover new things, and he tell his friend, "Come, we go to the park!"

The garden is quiet and green in the morning.

A small cat sits on the old chair and looks at the tree.

The cat has two big eyes and one funny whisker that goes up and down.

The whisker is very slow, and it does not run or jump.

A bird sits in the tree, and the cat does not like the bird.

The cat is hungry, but she do not know where the food is.

This is a mystery. No one in the garden can find the food.

A dog come to the door and ask the cat, "Do you know where the cheese is?"

The cat say, "No, this is a mystery, friend."

They sit and think, and the cat start to feel sad for the mystery.

Then they hear a loud noise, and the bird run into the tree.

The cat see a small mouse hide in a box close to the wall.

The mouse have a red hat and a blue book in his hand!

The cat laugh, and the dog laugh too. They are very happy now.

The cat go to the box, and the mouse give the key to the old door.

The mystery is not bad. It is a good story to read and tell.

The old house on the street is very quiet at night.

Two friends, I and my dog, want to find a room that no one knows.

We open the door and go in. This is the adventure!

We see a big room with a old chair and a table.

A small cat jumps up on the wall and looks at us.

We laugh and say, "Come down, funny cat!"

We find a box on the floor and open it. There is an old key in it!

We run to the door and the key is red and blue and green. It is a very good key.

We start to think: do we have an adventure or a bad day?

Then we hear a loud bird in the old tree in the garden.

We run to the window and look out at the night and the rain.

The cat is there too, and she sit close to us.

We give the cat some food, and she is not sad now.

We sit in the old room, we read an old book, and we eat some cheese and fish.

The dog is happy here, and we feel warm and kind.

We close the door, and the adventure in the old house is a good one.

The old house on the street is very quiet at night.

A small cat sits at the door and looks in.

In the old house, there is one room with a big blue chair and a red hat on the table.

Some say that the red hat is old, but a new friend calls it a wizard hat.

A wizard is a kind, funny friend who reads old books and helps other friends.

The cat in the old house is hungry, and she walks close to the window to see.

She can see a small dog in the room. He has the blue chair and he reads a big book like a wizard.

The dog is not a wizard, but he sits very slow and very quiet, like a good wizard at night.

The cat is sad she is not a wizard, but the dog gives her some food and she is happy again.

Then the rain comes down on the garden, and the cold water is on the old wall.

The dog and the cat look out at the rain and they smile.

In the morning, the dog finds a key on the floor, and the cat finds a fish in a box.

They go to the park, and the dog tells a new story. A wizard story, for a new friend.

I live in a small house on a green street. One day, I see a new cat at the door. She has big, funny eyes and a red hat. I ask her to come in, and she walks in slow and quiet. We sit on the chair and look at a book. Then the cat says, "I love adventure!" I do not know that word, but her big smile is very kind. She tells me a story of an adventure in the park. We find a old box and open it. In it, there is a key and some food. The cat is very happy. She says, "This adventure is good!" I think adventure is not bad. It is warm and funny. We eat cheese and drink water, and then the cat runs out to the garden. I follow her, and we find a blue bird and a small dog. We all play there all morning. When the rain comes at night, we sit close and read more. Now I have a new friend, and I do not feel sad or cold any more.

The cat has a key. The key is not here now. The cat look on the floor. The cat look in the basket. The basket is big and red. The key not in the basket. The cat go to the old house. The old house is a castle. The castle is very big and cold. The cat walk into the castle. She see a small basket in the room. The key is in that basket! The cat is happy. She run to the basket quick. She get the key and stop. Then she see a bird in the basket too. The cat do not want the bird. She open the basket and the bird fly out. The cat laugh. The bird sit on the table and eat the food. The cat and the bird look at the key. The key is good. The cat tell the story to her friend. The friend ask: "Do you have a new hat or a new book?" The cat smile and say: "I have a key." They walk out of the castle into the warm sun.

Cat Detective Blue has a big hat and a funny name.

One day, a small mouse come to her door and say, "Help! I need food!"

Blue look at him and ask, "Do you know a creature that live in this house?"

A creature is a small, quiet animal that not all of them can see.

Blue walk into the room and find a old box on the table.

In the box, there is a key, a book, and some fish for the mouse!

But then Blue hear a loud noise and see a dog run out of the room.

The dog is a bad creature. He want to catch the mouse and eat him!

Blue smile and say, "No, no, friend. This is not good."

She open the door of the garden and the mouse run out too.

The dog stand there and feel very sad.

Blue give the mouse some cheese and the dog get some water.

Now they all sit in the park and eat, and Blue read a new story to them.

The mouse and the dog laugh, and Blue smile too.

She is a kind cat detective, and she love to help them all.

There is a big tree in the garden. A small blue bird lives in the tree. The bird and the tree are very good friends. One day, the bird tells the tree: "I have a secret. A very, very secret!" The tree does not say a word. He is too old and too quiet to say loud words. The bird is happy that the tree is here to hear her secret. She whispers the secret into the tree. A quiet, small word that not even the cat or the dog can hear. The tree loves to hear her whisper, so he stands warm and big for her. The bird asks the tree: "Do you know my secret?" The tree thinks and thinks. Then he says: "Yes, I know. You want some food, but you do not want to tell me the name of the food." The bird laughs and smiles. She is not sad. She is happy that the tree is kind and funny. They sit and eat some cheese and fish, and the bird reads a new story out loud. The tree is happy, and the bird is happy, and the sun is warm on the old green tree.

The rain comes down all morning. It is very cold and the day is silent. No bird, no dog, no cat, and no mouse. The house is quiet and silent, like a small, warm box. A cat sits on the floor and looks at the window. She is hungry, and she has a basket by her. The basket is old and blue, and in it there is some food: one fish, two cheese, and a big red hat. The cat is happy. She does not need to make a loud sound. She is quiet and slow, and the silent house is good for her. Then the rain stops, and the sun comes out. The cat sees a bird in the garden. She runs to the basket, but the bird is quick. She cannot catch it. The cat is sad, but she is funny. She jumps up and down, and the silent house makes a funny sound. The bird flies to a old tree, and the cat calls to him. She is kind and she does not run. She sits close to the basket and reads a small book. The rain is good now, and the day is not bad at all.
